_comment: coins-registry.json — Add new coins here to expand the miner.
HOW TO ADD A NEW COIN:
1. Add a new entry to this array (copy the template below).
2. Add a matching entry in src/config.js under 'coins' with:
- rpc settings (host, port, user, password, gbtRules)
- stratumPort, miningAddress, blockReward, symbol, name
- daemonUpdate.githubRepo and installedVersion
3. Place the daemon exe under bin/<coinId>/  (the watchdog scans for *d.exe files).
4. Run: npm run build:installer:win  to rebuild the installer.
ALGORITHM NOTES:
scrypt  — Litecoin/Dogecoin style (most ASICs: Antminer L7, Goldshell LT6…)
sha256  — Bitcoin style (Antminer S19, Whatsminer M50…)
Both are supported by the proxy — set 'algorithm' and 'gbtRules' correctly.
MERGE-MINING (AuxPoW):
If a coin is merge-mined from another, set 'mergedParent' to the parent coinId.
Miners only connect to the parent stratum; the proxy handles AuxPoW automatically.
WATCHDOG NOTE:
The watchdog (watchdog.ps1) currently has hardcoded sections for lc2 and doge2.
When adding a third coin, duplicate the relevant watchdog section and update the
exe paths, RPC credentials, and process name to match the new coin.

coins._comment: TEMPLATE — copy this block, fill in values, remove the _disabled flag.
coins.name: New Coin
